notableEvents.label: Caleb Durbin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Caleb Durbin grounds into a double play, pitcher Nathan Eovaldi to second baseman Justin Foscue to first baseman Jake Burger. Jarren Duran out at 2nd. Caleb Durbin out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nicky Lopez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nicky Lopez lines out to left fielder Jarren Duran.

notableEvents.label: Nicky Lopez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nicky Lopez grounds out, first baseman Willson Contreras to pitcher Tommy Kahnle.

notableEvents.label: Joc Pederson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Joc Pederson grounds into a force out, second baseman Isiah Kiner-Falefa to shortstop Marcelo Mayer. Cody Freeman out at 2nd.
